name: Captain Rex
bannerMiniatureIdeas: A 501st clone helmet with blue jaig eyes mounted atop a Republic military standard, battle-scarred but upright
CT-7567 dog tags draped over a miniature LAAT/i nose panel painted with Torrent Company markings
A Torrent Company banner with crossed DC-17 blaster pistols fixed to a blast-dented riot shield base
vehicleSuggestions: LAAT/i Republic Gunship — Rex's iconic aerial deployment and extraction platform
AT-TE Walker — heavy assault walker Rex has commanded from the front lines
ARC-170 Starfighter — 501st Legion starfighter association for orbital support

factionTrait.name: Sentinal Champion
factionTrait.text: A sentinel moves the turn token +1 step when they have their banner on an objective hex during the end phase.

uniqueTraits.name: 501st Vanguard
uniqueTraits.text: Captain Rex cannot make claim actions. During the end phase, if he is not knocked out, Captain Rex counts as a banner for the purposes of gaining steps on the battle ladder.

ultimate.name: Reinforce the Line
ultimate.text: Follower units of all friendly champions in range, immediately make recruit actions up to maximum unit size.

plotSkills.name: Torrent Company Reinforcements
plotSkills.text: The 501st Legionnaires immediately make up to 2 recruit actions.

plotSkills.name: Lead from the Front
plotSkills.text: Move Captain Rex up to 1 hex. Then move each 501st Legionnaire that is within range up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: DC-17 Bash
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex.

traits.name: Brothers in Blue
traits.text: A 501st Legionnaire has +1 {dodge} and {protection} while it is within 2 hexes of Captain Rex.

plotSkills.name: Bacta Patch
plotSkills.text: If Captain Rex is within range, remove up to 1 wound from Captain Rex.

clashSkills.name: Bacta Patch
clashSkills.text: If Captain Rex is within range, remove up to 1 wound from Captain Rex.

clashSkills.name: Concentrated Fire
clashSkills.text: This skill gains +1 {accuracy_die} and +1 {damage_die} for each 501st Legionnaire adjacent to the target.
